title: U.S. teens with measurable hearing loss (%)

source.name: NHANES — National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey
source.publisher: CDC National Center for Health Statistics

notes: Illustrative; reflects share of 12-19 year olds with at least slight audiometric hearing loss (≥16 dB in at least one ear) per NHANES cycles. Noise-induced notch at 4 kHz used as indicator of noise damage.
